no: Adds missing visual effects to spell deflection, turning, mirror, and trap spells. Purely cosmetic fix — adds glowing animations (SPTURNI2, SPMAGGLO) to 15+ spells that were missing visual feedback. Safe additive patching (CLONE_EFFECT). v1.0 by Gamemacik

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Fixes and improves the visual effects of various spells in the Baldur's Gate series, correcting graphical errors and inconsistencies in spell animations.

co.no: Adds VVC visual effects to Physical Mirror, Spell Turning, Spell Deflection, Protection from Spell School, and Spell Trap. No gameplay changes
